inputs.label: Number of Devices
inputs.businessContext: Total count of devices with standby mode.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total count of devices with standby mode.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bekleme moduna sahip toplam cihaz sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'appareils en mode veille.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de dispositivos con modo de espera.

inputs.label: Standby Power per Device
inputs.businessContext: Power consumed per device in standby mode (watts).

businessContext_i18n.en: Power consumed per device in standby mode (watts).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance consommée par appareil en mode veille (watts).
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia consumida por dispositivo en modo de espera (vatios).

inputs.label: Hours in Standby per Day
inputs.businessContext: Average hours per day the device is in standby (not active).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hours per day the device is in standby (not active).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cihazın günde ortalama bekleme süresi (aktif değil) (saat).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Stunden pro Tag, in denen das Gerät im Standby ist (nicht aktiv).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen d'heures par jour où l'appareil est en veille (non actif).
businessContext_i18n.es: Promedio de horas por día que el dispositivo está en espera (no activo).

inputs.label: Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in billing period (typically 30).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days in billing period (typically 30).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours dans la période de facturation (généralement 30).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días en el período de facturación (típicamente 30).

inputs.label: Electricity Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilowatt-hour in local currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilowatt-hour in local currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilovatsaat başına yerel para birimi cinsinden maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Kilowattstunde in lokaler Währung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par kilowattheure en devise locale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por kilovatio-hora en moneda local.

inputs.label: CO2 Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Carbon intensity of grid electricity (kg CO2 per kWh).

businessContext_i18n.en: Carbon intensity of grid electricity (kg CO2 per kWh).
businessContext_i18n.de: CO₂-Intensität des Netzstroms (kg CO₂ pro kWh).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intensité carbone de l'électricité du réseau (kg CO2 par kWh).
businessContext_i18n.es: Intensidad de carbono de la electricidad de la red (kg CO2 por kWh).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
